headlines.title: Meet the elite US teams tasked with combat rescues
headlines.description: Air force pararescue units who specialise in CSAR missions are among the most highly trained in the US military.

headlines.title: Artemis II crew take spectacular image of Earth
headlines.description: The snap was taken aboard the Orion capsule by its commander, Reid Wiseman, as the crew head towards the Moon.

headlines.title: Burkina Faso must forget about democracy, military leader says
headlines.description: Capt Ibrahim Traore, who seized power in 2023, says democratic rule would not work for his country.

headlines.title: French-owned ship passes through Strait of Hormuz
headlines.description: It appears to be the first ship owned by a major European firm to go through the strait since the conflict began.

headlines.title: Frances Muslim gathering ban overturned by courts
headlines.description: The Paris police department had argued that the four-day gathering was a security threat because it could be a target of terrorism.

headlines.title: Rapper Gucci Mane kidnapped and robbed by fellow artist, prosecutors say
headlines.description: Officials say the hip-hop star was forced to sign papers releasing a rapper known as Pooh Shiesty from his record contract.

headlines.title: Trump seeks $1.5tn for defence alongside domestic spending cuts
headlines.description: The US president new budget would cut non-defence spending by 10%, partly by slashing domestic programmes.

headlines.title: Cuba begins releasing more than 2,000 prisoners as US pressure mounts
headlines.description: US President Trump has made clear his desire to change Cuba leadership and has placed the country under an oil embargo.

headlines.title: US deports eight people of African origin to Uganda
headlines.description: The Uganda Law Society criticises the deportation, saying it was illegal and dehumanising.

headlines.title: Italys famed Uffizi admits cyber-attack but denies security breach
headlines.description: Hackers were reported to have infiltrated IT systems - but the gallery says its works are safe.

headlines.title: Pete Hegseth asks US Army top general to step down
headlines.description: Gen Randy George was nominated for the role in 2023 by former President Joe Biden.

headlines.title: Trump removes US Attorney General Pam Bondi
headlines.description: Bondi time as top US law enforcement officer was overshadowed by her handling of the Epstein files.

headlines.title: When will the Iran war end? Tracing the Trump administration timelines
headlines.description: Experts say many US presidents have offered a timeline for a conflict - only to then shift their estimates.

headlines.title: M&S boss calls for more action on crime and abuse of staff
headlines.description: Thinus Keeve comments come days after an M&S store was targeted during disorder in south London.

headlines.title: Funeral boss will pay for what he did - baby mum
headlines.description: Jasmine Beverley son was stillborn and his funeral was arranged by the now-disgraced Robert Bush.

headlines.title: Boy, 14, shot dead in Woolwich named
headlines.description: A boy, 14, shot dead in south-east London is named as Eghosa Ogbebor, as three people are arrested.

headlines.title: Marmalades may need to be relabelled under post-Brexit food deal
headlines.description: The breakfast favourite will be legally renamed when Britain aligns with new EU labelling rules.

headlines.title: School IT system targeted in cyber attack ahead of exam season
headlines.description: The EA says immediate steps were taken to contain the issue, but it cannot confirm whether any personal data has been affected.

headlines.title: Storm Dave set to bring Easter gales, rain and blizzards to UK
headlines.description: Damage and travel disruption are likely in the north of the UK with a Met Office named storm expected to sweep through on Saturday.

headlines.title: 今年度予算案 与党側は来週前半にも採決行いたい考え
headlines.description: 参议院で審議が続く今年度予算案について、与党側は来週前半にも採決を行いたい考えです。

headlines.title: 安全保障関連3文書改定 有識者会議メンバーに佐々江氏ら起用へ
headlines.description: 安全保障関連の3文書の改定に向けて、政府は今月下旬にも有識者会議の初会合を開くことにしています。

headlines.title: WFP事務局次長 イラン情勢で支援できる人数減ると危機感
headlines.description: イラン情勢をめぐり、WFPのダガシュ事務局次長がNHKの取材に応じました。

headlines.title: ドジャース 大谷翔平 今季初ホームラン
headlines.description: 大リーグ、ドジャースの大谷翔平選手がナショナルズ戦に先発出场し、今シーズン1号となるスリーランホームランを打ちました。

headlines.title: 北九州 若松区 3歳女児が車にはねられ死亡
headlines.description: 3日夜、北九州市で交差点を渡っていた3歳の女の子が乗用車にはねられ、死亡しました。

headlines.title: フィギュア りくりゅうペアがオリンピック後初の演技披露
headlines.description: 三浦璃来選手と木原龍一選手のりくりゅうペアがアイスショーに出演しました。

CNN.note: RSS feed contains stale data - not included
